name_cn:
22b Autumn/Winter New Collection [Happy]
19 bag tote shopping bag [Color][Color]
19 SHOPPING BAG 22b is a popular tote shopping bag with amazing capacity [Strong][Strong]. It follows a classic minimalist style, and the real item is very classic and durable. It is also relatively light, made of imported soft lambskin with a great touch.
Model: 3519
Dimensions: 30*37*10cm
